programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Rob Bironas kicked a 26-yard field goal in overtime, and the Titans stopped backup quarterback Shaun Hill on fourth down to finally pull out a 44-41 win over the Detroit Lions.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Watch the Week 14 matchup between the San Francisco 49ers and the New Orleans Saints where Jimmy Garoppolo finished with 349 yards and four touchdown passes. Dec. 8, 2019.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Matthew Stafford threw his fifth touchdown pass from 1 yard to Brandon Pettigrew and Jason Hanson's extra point with no time on the clock gave Detroit a thrilling 38-37 win over Cleveland.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The Giants and Cowboys duel in an NFC East classic showdown that features six lead changes in the fourth quarter and overtime as Russell Wilson and Malik Nabers look to outshine Dak Prescott and CeeDee Lamb.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: In one of the most chaotic endings in NFL history, the Seattle Seahawks stun the Green Bay Packers with rookie Russell Wilson's last second Hail Mary touchdown to WR Golden Tate.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Peyton Manning is back in Indianapolis, but Colts quarterback Andrew Luck threw three touchdown passes and ran for another score Sunday night, handing the Denver Broncos a 39-33 loss.

programme.desc: Peyton Manning is back in Indianapolis, but Colts quarterback Andrew Luck threw three touchdown passes and ran for another score Sunday night, handing the Denver Broncos a 39-33 loss.

programme.desc: Kansas City Chiefs turned to Travis Kelce and Tyreek Hill to roll past the Denver Broncos 33-10 on Sunday night and keep their AFC West title hopes alive.

programme.title: Build a Better Game
programme.desc: Focusing on priming the setup and utilizing ground force to increase driving distance.

programme.title: Build a Better Game
programme.sub-title: Through the Bag: How a Straw Can Improve Your Putting
programme.desc: Golf has never been more of a power game than it is right now. Shortening the golf course off the tee has a bigger impact on lowering scores than ever before. And it's not just a strategy for disruptor-pros like Bryson DeChambeau.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Rocco Mediate shares his best tips and unique drills. Rocco talks about how learning to top the ball on purpose can help you become a better ball striker.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Rocco Mediate talks the short game and how you can master feel around the greens by using the bounce of your wedge.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Ian Poulter, 12-time European Tour winner and Ryder Cup stalwart, showcases his very best putting instruction. He shares his best advice on how to improve your scoring from all distances on the green.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Ian Poulter showcases his very best putting instruction. He teaches how to make more putts focusing on comfort and your natural abilities on the greens.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Ian Poulter gives advice on lowering a handicap through better iron play.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Nine-time PGA Tour winner Stuart Appleby shows how he executes a variety of shots around the green -- bump and run, high pitch, and the sought-after two-hop-and-stop shot.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Nine-time PGA Tour winner Stuart Appleby teaches his trade secrets on all aspects of the full swing, from dialing in wedges to a secret move to get extra yards off the tee. Appleby also displays the keys to proper setup and posture.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Nine-time PGA Tour winner Stuart Appleby dedicates an entire episode to cover all aspects of bunker play. He instructs how to get out of the sand with precision from side hill, downhill, uphill, plugged, and routine lies.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Jimmy Walker shares tips that helped him become a major champion, specializing on and around the green. Jimmy discusses the keys to greenside bunker play, teaches how to chip it close with the wedge, and reveals how an alignment rod helps sink putts.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Jimmy Walker talks all aspects of distance, bringing out the driver to show how to gain distance off the tee and how to tone it down.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.sub-title: Birdie Challenge with Aaron Hicks & Hailey Ostrom
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal invites MLB star Aaron Hicks and golf influencer Hailey Ostrom for a high-stakes round of golf.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair joins World Series champion Cody Ross to face NFL Hall of Famer Brian Urlacher and MLB star Mark Mulder in a match of bold moves.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal teams up with Sabrina Andolpho, founder of the influencer group Golf Girl Games, for competitions with athletes and celebrities.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Follow Randall Hunt and Brianna Asman as they learn how to increase range of motion, add distance and play pain-free golf through a 90-day program of swing instruction.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Follow Randall Hunt and Matt Avril learn how to increase mobility and turn his slice into a powerful draw.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: GolfPass coach Nathalie Sheehan has put together a practice plan to correct some of the biggest swing faults.

programme.desc: GolfPass coach Nathalie Sheehan has put together a practice plan using other popular sports to lower your golf scores.

programme.title: The Golf Fix

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake hits the course to improve iron play from a variety of lies; learning to stick it from the fairway like Tiger Woods, play from the rough like Bryson DeChambeau and make solid contact from fairway bunkers.
